task_completion.description: Verify that the DICOM image is loaded and visible in the viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM viewer application is open and displays an image, which initially shows four distinct quadrants.

task_completion.description: Verify that the image is zoomed to at least 300% magnification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The zoom level indicator in the viewer's UI (often in the corner of the image viewport or toolbar) displays a value of 300% or greater.

task_completion.description: Verify that an off-center quadrant is centered in the view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view is zoomed in and panned so that one specific quadrant of the original image occupies the center of the display area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the export dialog is opened to save the visible cropped sub-region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or save dialog is visible on screen, with options selected to export the 'current view' or 'visible region' rather than the original full image.

task_completion.description: Verify that the export path is set to ~/DICOM/exports/figure_roi.jpg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the file name as 'figure_roi.jpg' and the directory path as '~/DICOM/exports/' or '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the DICOM viewer's GUI to export the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the DICOM viewer's menus and export dialogs, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to crop or convert the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing commands like 'convert', 'mogrify', or Python scripts to process the image.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual DICOM viewer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is a genuine DICOM viewer (e.g., Weasis) and not a text editor or a generic image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the exported image is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/figure_roi.jpg'. The expected format is JPEG. The original synthetic DICOM image has dimensions 1024x1024 pixels and is divided into four distinct quadrants.
